sellers_note: Discover the Pinnacle of Luxury and Capability in the 2024 Lexus RX 350 Premium Plus. This exceptional SUV blends sophisticated style, advanced technology, and uncompromising performance to elevate your driving experience.- NEW FRONT BRAKES!- COLD AREA PACKAGE: Includes window and windshield wiper de-icer- CONVENIENCE PACKAGE: Includes back monitor cleaning, intelligent parking assist, electrochromic heated outside rearview mirror, blind spot monitor, and Lane Change Assist with Lane Keeping Assist System- TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE: Includes FOB, digital high key plate, digital inside rearview mirror with garage door opener, Normal Head Up Display, and standard normal speed meter- 21'' 20-Spoke Alloy Wheels with 235/50R21 All-Season Tires- Power Rear Door with Kick Sensor and Automatic Easy Door CloserAnchored by a robust 2.4L I4 turbocharged engine mated to an 8-speed automatic transmission, the 2024 Lexus RX 350 Premium Plus delivers an exceptional balance of power and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 21 city/28 highway MPG. The available Lexus all-wheel-drive system ensures confident handling and traction in all conditions.Inside, the RX 350 Premium Plus surrounds you in unparalleled luxury. Heated and ventilated front seats, a heated steering wheel, and a 14-inch high-definition touchscreen display with wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration keep you connected and comfortable. The Convenience Package adds thoughtful features like a back monitor cleaning system and intelligent parking assist, while the Technology Package elevates your drive with a digital high key plate, digital rearview mirror, and a Head-Up Display.Safety is equally paramount, with advanced driver-assistance technologies like Blind Spot Monitoring, Lane Change Assist, and Lane Keeping Assist providing added peace of mind. The RX 350 Premium Plus also boasts a comprehensive suite of airbags and electronic stability control systems to protect you and your passengers.With its striking Nightfall Mica exterior, the 2024 Lexus RX 350 Premium Plus commands attention wherever it goes. Its sculpted lines and premium design cues exude a sense of refined sophistication that is unmistakably Lexus.Experience the pinnacle of luxury and capability in the 2024 Lexus RX 350 Premium Plus. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this exceptional SUV can elevate your driving experience.
